lessons.name: Review 3 (Units 7 - 8 - 9)
lessons.description: Review of Units 7, 8, and 9 covering natural wonders, tourism, and World Englishes.

sections.heading: 1. Language - Vocabulary
sections.content:
Unit 7: Natural Wonders of the World

Key vocabulary: mountain, volcano, waterfall, canyon, cave, desert, forest, glacier, coral reef, magnificent, spectacular, breathtaking, explore, discover

Unit 8: Tourism

Key vocabulary: tourist, traveler, sightseeing, tour, destination, hotel, resort, accommodation, flight, attraction, landmark, monument

Unit 9: World Englishes

Key vocabulary: British English, American English, accent, dialect, pronunciation, fluent, native speaker, bilingual, communicate, international, global

sections.heading: 2. Language - Grammar
sections.content:
Unit 7: Reported Yes/No Questions

Structure: S + asked (+ O) + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì)

Tense changes: Present → Past; Will → Would; Can → Could; Did → had + V3

Unit 8: Relative Pronouns

Pronouns: who/whom (người), which (vật), that (người/vật), whose (sở hữu), where (nơi), when (thời gian)

Usage: Chủ ngữ (không thể bỏ), Tân ngữ (có thể bỏ)

Unit 9: Defining Relative Clauses

Defining: Không có dấu phẩy, cần thiết để xác định

Reduction: V-ing (chủ động), V3/ed (bị động), to-infinitive (the first/only/last)

sections.heading: 3. Skills - Reading Passages
sections.content:
Passage 1: Natural Wonders and Tourism

"Do you like mountains?" he asked me. He asked me if I liked mountains. I told him about Ha Long Bay, which is one of the most beautiful places in Vietnam. The tourists who visit Ha Long Bay are always amazed by its beauty.

The hotel where we stayed was near the beach. The guide whose knowledge was impressive showed us around. Everything that he said about the caves was interesting. It's the best place that I've ever visited.

Passage 2: World Englishes

"Can you speak English?" she asked me. She asked me if I could speak English. I explained that English is a language which is spoken worldwide. The people who speak English come from many countries.

The student whose English is good will have more opportunities. The country where English is the official language attracts many tourists. The time when we learn English is important for our future.

sections.heading: 4. Skills - Practice
sections.content:
Comprehension Questions:

  1. What did he ask about mountains?
  2. Which place is one of the most beautiful in Vietnam?
  3. Who are always amazed by Ha Long Bay?
  4. What language is spoken worldwide?

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Reported Yes/No Questions
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: S + asked + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì)

examples.question: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I liked mountains.
examples.explanation: Do you like → if/whether I liked

examples.question: The tourist ______ visited us was friendly.
examples.solution: The tourist who/that visited us was friendly.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Defining Relative Clauses
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: Không dấu phẩy, cần thiết

examples.question: The man ______ speaks English is a teacher.
examples.solution: The man who/that speaks English is a teacher.
examples.explanation: Mệnh đề xác định (không dấu phẩy)

examples.question: The man who speaks English → The man ______.

exercises.question: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me ______ I liked mountains.
exercises.explanation: Yes/No question → if/whether

exercises.question: "Will you go there?" → She asked me if I ______ there.
exercises.explanation: Will you go → I would go

exercises.question: "Can you see the waterfall?" → He asked me if I ______ the waterfall.
exercises.explanation: Can you see → I could see

exercises.question: "Did you climb the mountain?" → He asked me if I ______ the mountain.
exercises.explanation: Did you climb → I had climbed

exercises.question: The tourist ______ visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: who thay thế cho người

exercises.question: The hotel ______ we stayed at was nice.
exercises.explanation: which thay thế cho vật

exercises.question: The tourist ______ bag was lost is upset.
exercises.explanation: whose = sở hữu

exercises.question: The city ______ I was born is beautiful.
exercises.explanation: where = nơi chốn

exercises.question: It's the best hotel ______ I've ever stayed at.
exercises.explanation: Sau so sánh nhất → dùng that

exercises.question: The man ______ speaks English is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: who thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: The book ______ I read was interesting.
exercises.explanation: which thay thế cho vật (tân ngữ)

exercises.question: The student ______ English is good will win.
exercises.explanation: whose = sở hữu

exercises.question: The man who speaks English → The man ______ English.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking

exercises.question: The book which was written by him → The book ______ by him.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: which was written → written

exercises.question: The first person who came → The first person ______.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who came → to come

exercises.question: "Are you here now?" → He asked me if I was ______ ______.
exercises.explanation: here → there; now → then

exercises.question: Everything ______ he said was true.
exercises.explanation: Sau everything → dùng that

exercises.question: The country ______ English is spoken is the UK.
exercises.explanation: where = nơi chốn

exercises.question: The woman ______ I met speaks three languages.
exercises.explanation: whom thay thế cho người (tân ngữ)

exercises.question: "Did you visit the cave?" → He asked if I ______ the cave.
exercises.explanation: Did you visit → I had visited

exercises.question: Which are correct reported Yes/No questions? (Select all that apply)
options: He asked if I liked mountains.
She asked whether I was visiting.
He asked if did I go.
She asked if I could help.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: if I liked, whether I was visiting, if I could. Sai: if did I go (không đảo)

exercises.question: Which relative pronouns can replace people? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: who, whom, that (cho người). Sai: which (cho vật)

exercises.question: Which are defining relative clauses? (Select all that apply)
options: The man who speaks English is a teacher.
My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
The book that I read was good.
London, which is in England, is big.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: không có dấu phẩy (xác định). Sai: có dấu phẩy (không xác định)

exercises.question: Transform: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.correct: if/whether I liked mountains / if I liked mountains / whether I liked mountains
exercises.explanation: Do you like → if/whether I liked

exercises.question: Fill in: The tourist ______ visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người

exercises.question: Fill in: The man ______ speaks English is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: who/that thay thế cho người (chủ ngữ)

exercises.question: Reduce: The man who speaks English → The man ______.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking

exercises.question: Rearrange: asked / He / me / if / liked / I / mountains / . / tourist / The / who / visited / us / was / friendly / .
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if I liked mountains. The tourist who visited us was friendly.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: reported question với if; relative clause với who

exercises.question: Transform: "Can you speak English?" → She asked me ______.
exercises.sample_answer: She asked me if/whether I could speak English.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Can you speak → if/whether I could speak

exercises.question: Combine: The man is a teacher. The man speaks English. → The man ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The man who/that speaks English is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: dùng who/that thay thế cho 'the man'

exercises.question: Rearrange and reduce: man / The / who / speaks / English / → / man / The / ______ / English / . / book / The / which / was / written / → / book / The / ______ / .
exercises.sample_answer: The man who speaks English → The man speaking English. The book which was written → The book written.
exercises.explanation: Rút gọn: who speaks → speaking; which was written → written

exercises.question: Combine all grammar: "Do you like natural wonders?" He asked me. The place is beautiful. I visited the place. The tourist speaks English. → Transform the question and combine the sentences using relative clauses.
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if/whether I liked natural wonders. The place (which/that) I visited is beautiful. The tourist who/that speaks English...
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: reported question (if/whether I liked) + relative clauses (which/that I visited, who/that speaks)
